project.name: Patient Portal & Telehealth Platform
project.description: A HIPAA-compliant web application for patient records, appointment scheduling, and real-time telehealth video consultations.

budget.notes: Covers infrastructure, licensing, and development for the initial 6-month build.

functional: Patient record management with audit logging
HL7 FHIR data exchange with external EHR systems
non_functional: Auditable access trail for compliance reporting
